name: @aurorabr/web
description: Landing page e setup.sh endpoint do Aurora Stack (stack.aurora-mcp.com)

scripts.copy:setup: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const s='../../setup/setup.sh';if(fs.existsSync(s)){fs.mkdirSync('public',{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(s,'public/setup.sh');console.log('setup.sh copiado pra public/')}else{console.log('setup.sh source nao encontrado ('+s+') — pulando (Dockerfile copia via COPY)')}"
